data.title: Southwest's Sustainable Fuel Push: Deal With Valero Set To Fuel Chicago Midway Operations
data.description: Southwest Airlines enters SAF supply agreement with Valero. Southwest will purchase a minimum of 3.6 million gallons of neat SAF for use in its operations as early as Q4 2024.

Is It Worth Investing in Chipotle Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
data.description: When deciding whether to buy, sell, or hold a stock, investors often rely on analyst recommendations. Media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm-employed (or sell-side) analysts often influence a stock's price, but are they really important?
